title: Hikvision ISAPI Camera Tamper and Vandalism Events
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="hikvision:isapi" earliest=-7d
| where match(lower(event_type), "(?i)tamper|vandal|cover|defocus")
| stats count by camera_id site
description: Tamper events indicate physical interference or environmental displacement requiring guard response.
value: Shortens response to sabotage attempts at sensitive perimeters.
implementation: (1) Enable ISAPI event subscription to HEC. (2) Deduplicate vibration spikes. (3) Correlate with access logs.
grandmaExplanation: We alert when someone interferes with a camera physically.
